era: 1993-2002. Noise Rock. E=6 -- abrasive, confrontational, engineered distortion. Capitol Hill. Tag/DGC.
associated_musicians: Pearl Jam (Eddie Vedder, biographical connection to Liebling)

theory_nodes.concept: Tag/DGC boutique imprint: major-label distribution for noise rock. Unusual structural position in mid-1990s alternative label landscape.
theory_nodes.description: Noise rock band with major-label distribution via boutique imprint.

theory_nodes.concept: Beth Liebling artistic identity. Creative force of Hovercraft independent of Pearl Jam adjacency. Bass as distortion texture. Electronics as active participant.
theory_nodes.description: Electronics integration unusual in Capitol Hill scene.

theory_nodes.concept: Final sixth opens at 301. 60 degrees remain. S36 final sixth: experimental and mature-era bands at considered energy levels.

cross_references.relationship: E=6 holds. Fremont to Capitol Hill. Melodic grunge-adjacent to abrasive noise rock.
E=6 holds. Noise Rock to Grunge/Alt. Capitol Hill continues.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=8 SPS. FIRST CERVIDAE IN APEX PREDATOR ARC. Haunting descending scream from river valley. E=6 + E=8 = E=14.
